case_title: SHIRLEY LIU VS. ALVIN HOLDEN ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF PER DIEM RENTAL VALUE AND ABSENSE OF ORIGINAL LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, SHIRLEY AS ACTING TRUSTEE OF THE ALICE CHOU HSIN HUANG TRUST

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, SHIRLEY AS ACTING TRUSTEE OF THE ALICE CHOU HSIN HUANG TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT HOLDEN, ALVIN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, SHIRLEY AS ACTING TRUSTEE OF THE ALICE CHOU HSIN HUANG TRUST SERVED JUL-27-2018, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HOLDEN, ALVIN
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, SHIRLEY AS ACTING TRUSTEE OF THE ALICE CHOU HSIN HUANG TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT HOLDEN, ALVIN DOES 1 TO 10
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT HOLDEN, ALVIN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIU, SHIRLEY AS ACTING TRUSTEE OF THE ALICE CHOU HSIN HUANG TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOLDEN, ALVIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 431 44TH AVENUE, #301, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94121, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, LEASE FORFEITED, **APPLIES TO ANY/ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS.**
